description: Set up a mutual TLS (mTLS) authentication system between Docker containers within '~/projects/tls-setup/'. Generate a self-signed Certificate Authority (CA) with CN='AcmeCorp Internal CA', a Server Certificate for 'acme-gateway' including Subject Alternative Names (SAN) for 'acme-gateway' and 'localhost', and a Client Certificate for 'acme-backend-client'. Deploy an Nginx container named 'acme-gateway' on a Docker network called 'acme-tls-net' that requires client certificate authentication on port 443. Verify the configuration by demonstrating that connections succeed only when using the client certificate, saving the successful verification output to '~/Desktop/tls_verification.txt'. Additionally, provide a PKI documentation file at '~/Desktop/pki_documentation.txt' detailing the certificate hierarchy and rotation strategy.
